headline: Is Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) Pricing Reflect Recent Rebound And Long Term Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether Zebra Technologies is offering good value right now or if the price already reflects the story, this article walks through what the current market is implying about the stock. The share price most recently closed at US$255.55, with a gain of 12.2% over the last 30 days but a decline of 10.1% over the past year and a fall of 48.6% over five years, which can leave investors unsure how to weigh short term strength against a longer track record.
